segments.text: Teshi with the calm platform shield, but...
segments.original_text: テシ選手冷静な台上ガードでしたが
もうチャージショットくらえないぞ

segments.text: Coming back safe from above with the full hop!
segments.original_text: 大ジャンプで上から安全に返ってくる

segments.text: Fair against the up smash endlag...
segments.original_text: 空中前を上スマの後隙

segments.text: Didn't land, but made it through!
segments.original_text: 当てなかったがここはなんとか

full_text: Teshi with the calm platform shield, but... Teshi with the fair! Can't take another charged shot! Coming back safe from above with the full hop! Fair against the up smash endlag... Didn't land, but made it through!

corrections.original: チェス選手冷静な対上ガード
corrections.corrected: テシ選手冷静な台上ガード
